scripts.build: bun run js:build && bun run css:build && bun run bundle:copy && bun run lint
scripts.css:build: bun run css:bootstrap && bun run css:tailwind && bun run css:custom
scripts.css:watch: bun run --bun sass --watch assets/styles/beacon-bootstrap.scss:assets/dist/beacon-bootstrap.css --no-source-map & bun run --bun tailwindcss -i assets/styles/beacon-tailwind.css -o assets/dist/beacon-tailwind.css --watch
scripts.bundle:copy: cp assets/styles/beacon-admin.css assets/styles/beacon-modern.css assets/styles/beacon-enterprise.css assets/styles/beacon-brut.css src/Resources/public/ && cp assets/js/admin.js src/Resources/public/
scripts.lint: bun run biome:check && bun run css:lint
scripts.ci: bun run --bun biome ci assets/ && bun run css:build
